summary: Tested 'Save and Create New' button feature across 6 pages/dialogs. All 6 locations have the button implemented correctly with Arabic text 'حفظ وإنشاء جديد'.

issues: Console warnings: Missing `Description` or `aria-describedby={undefined}` for {DialogContent} - should add DialogDescription for accessibility
